DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion And P&A
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BIZON GROUP, INC., VITALI BARKOUSKI's Motion to Set ASide Default.

Defendants' motion to set aside the default is granted. Relief is mandatory under the "attorney affidavit" provision of Code of Civ. Proc. 473(b). A motion for relief based on an affidavit of fault does not need to establish that the mistake was excusable, as Plaintiff seems to argue. (Vaccaro v. Kaiman (1998) 63 Cal.App.4th 761, 770 ["This provision requires the court to vacate a dismissal upon the attorney's sworn statement of neglect, regardless whether the neglect was excusable or whether other conditions for discretionary relief are satisfied."].) Mr. Cantor's affidavit adequately attests to his mistaken belief that his clients were not served. Mr. Cantor must pay reasonable compensatory legal fees and costs to Plaintiff in the amount of $1,000.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
